title: LVRB Fusion PRO v2.3
author: xyogox
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: LVRB Fusion PRO v2.3 by xyogox.

LVRB Fusion PRO v2.3 Liquidity Vacuum Reversal Breakout System LVRB Fusion PRO v2.3 is an advanced price-action indicator designed to detect situations where the market forms a consolidation range, sweeps liquidity through a false breakout, and then moves strongly in the opposite direction.
The indicator automatically identifies these structures and visualizes potential trading setups with clearly defined Entry, Stop Loss, and multiple Take Profit levels.
